slides.title: Stay able to *move freely* for life.
slides.sub: Flexibility and joint mobility quietly decide how you age. A little daily care protects both.

slides.title: Range of motion fades if unused
slides.body: Joints keep the range you regularly ask of them. Skip the full reach for years and your body *slowly stops offering it*.

slides.title: Stiffness limits you later
slides.body: Tight hips and shoulders make stairs, floors and reaching harder over time. Mobility is *quiet insurance* on your independence.

slides.title: A few gentle minutes daily
slides.body: Slow, controlled movement through your full range can support healthier joints. Daily and unhurried beats heroic and rare.

slides.title: Mind your hips and shoulders
slides.body: These two areas carry most everyday movement. Keeping them mobile *may help* you sit, lift and turn with ease for longer.

slides.title: Move it to keep it
slides.body: Mobility is a use it or lose it skill. A few honest minutes a day can support the freedom to move for decades.

slides.title: Keep *moving freely* for life.
slides.body: Vibe Health folds mobility and movement into one daily score, so you can see the habits that keep your body capable.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
The goal isn't just to live long. It's to stay able to move freely the whole way. 🌿

Range of motion fades when you stop using it. A few gentle minutes a day on your hips and shoulders can support the freedom to bend, lift and reach for decades. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns daily movement into one simple score → link in bio.
youtube_title: How Flexibility and Mobility Keep You Moving for Life
